title: Add tags to room
description: This example demonstrates how to add custom tags to a room using a button.

title: Create file
description: This example demonstrates how to create a new file inside a DocSpace room using a button.

title: Create folder
description: This example demonstrates how to create a folder in a room.

title: Create password hash
description: This example demonstrates how to generate a secure hash from a plain-text password using DocSpace SDK methods.

title: Create room
description: This example demonstrates how to create a new shared room.

title: Create tag
description: This example demonstrates how to create a new custom tag in DocSpace using the JavaScript SDK.

title: Destroy frame
description: This example demonstrates how to destroy (remove) the embedded DocSpace iframe using the JavaScript SDK.

title: Get config
description: This example demonstrates how to retrieve the configuration object of the embedded frame.

title: Get files and folders list
description: This example demonstrates how to retrieve both files and folders from a DocSpace room using the JavaScript SDK.

title: Get files
description: This example demonstrates how to retrieve a list of files from a room using the JavaScript SDK method.

title: Get folder info
description: This example demonstrates how to retrieve information about the current folder in DocSpace using the JavaScript SDK.

title: Get folders
description: This example demonstrates how to retrieve a list of folders from a shared DocSpace room using the JavaScript SDK.

title: Get hash settings
description: This example demonstrates how to retrieve hash-based settings from the embedded DocSpace frame using the JavaScript SDK.

title: Get rooms
description: This example demonstrates how to retrieve a list of available rooms using the JavaScript SDK embedded in a DocSpace frame.

title: Get selection
description: This example demonstrates how to retrieve the current selection in the DocSpace interface using the JavaScript SDK.

title: Get user info
description: This example demonstrates how to retrieve user information using the JavaScript SDK embedded in a DocSpace frame.

title: Initialize editor
description: This example demonstrates how to open a document in the ONLYOFFICE DocSpace editor using the JavaScript SDK method.

title: Initialize file selector
description: This example demonstrates how to initialize the DocSpace file selector using the JavaScript SDK.

title: Initialize frame
description: This example demonstrates how to initialize the DocSpace view-only frame using the JavaScript SDK method.

title: Initialize manager
description: This example demonstrates how to initialize the DocSpace manager using the JavaScript SDK.

title: Initialize room selector
description: This example demonstrates how to embed the room selection interface using the JavaScript SDK method.

title: Initialize system
description: This example demonstrates how to initialize the DocSpace system interface using the JavaScript SDK.

title: Initialize viewer
description: This example demonstrates how to embed a read-only document viewer using the JavaScript SDK method.

title: Login
description: This example demonstrates how to log in to DocSpace using the JavaScript SDK by hashing the password.

title: Logout
description: This example demonstrates how to log out a user from the DocSpace session using the JavaScript SDK method.

title: Mark iframe as loaded
description: This example demonstrates how to explicitly mark the iframe as loaded using the JavaScript SDK method.

title: Open modal
description: This example demonstrates how to open a predefined modal window in DocSpace using the JavaScript SDK.

title: Remove tags from room
description: This example demonstrates how to remove one or more tags from a room using the JavaScript SDK method.

title: Set config
description: This example demonstrates how to update the configuration of the embedded DocSpace frame using the JavaScript SDK.

title: Set list view
description: This example demonstrates how to change the file list display mode in DocSpace using the JavaScript SDK.
